DIOR Book Tote Shopping Bag

items.name_cn:
,High Version
【New Coconut Tree Ocean Blue❤ Medium】
Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a flagship piece embodying Dior's aesthetic. It holds daily essentials and features a fresh interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a stylish look. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" logo, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.: 1286
Size: 36×28 cm

items.name_cn:
!!️
Nomad Clutch Lunch Box Series
Upgraded lunch box bag, who understands the joy of having a shoulder strap included
The added adjustable long strap greatly improves practicality
Simple and soft silhouette, very lightweight for personal use
The hardware letter logo on the strap is another highlight
This vintage print lunch box really understands daily life
Capacity fits everything needed for commuting
Classic Oblique denim gets better with age
Pairs perfectly with T-shirts and knitwear for a relaxed, premium look
Definitely a practical bag you can carry for years
size:22*13*9.5cm

items.name_cn:
(Large) DI0R Oblique 2019s Backpack
A couple's style DI0R Oblique backpack. In addition to the vintage pattern, it features small metal logos, giving it a soft and cute look. The canvas material is very lightweight, has a large capacity, and is practical with a great appearance ~
The iconic oblique vintage print pattern has integrated into everyone's fashionable attitude~ Carrying vintage items makes you feel like you're at Paris Fashion Week wherever you go. Highly recommended🖤 for a couple's look
Large: 29×14×36 CM
Small: 23.5×11×32 CM
#088#510

Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag

The front is decorated with a "Christian Dior" logo, fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.

Dimensions: 42×35×18.5cm

items.name_en: [Heart][Rose] Original 2024 Early Spring Style [Heart][Rose]! Dior Book Tote
items.name_cn:
[Heart][Rose] Original 2024 Early Spring Style [Heart][Rose]! Dior Book Tote
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this tote bag is a flagship product embodying Dior aesthetics. Designed for daily essentials, this medium tote features all-over embroidery paired with the iconic blue Dior Oblique pattern and a "Christian Dior" logo on the front. Fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, it can be paired with other small accessories or Mitzah scarves for a cohesive look!
Adjustable, removable embroidered shoulder strap
Internal zip pocket
2 internal patch pockets
Includes dust bag
Number: M1324CZBB_M928
Dimensions: 36.5×28×17.5cm
